== Notes for [[Item:Q106149|Q106149]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth): c. 593 AD
* Wafaat (Death): c. Rabi ul Aakhir 4 AH (c. September 625 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zaynab_bint_Jahsh

Source 2: http://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zainab_bint_Dschahsch
--------------------
* Wilaadat (Birth): 595 AD
* Wafaat (Death): 624 AD

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zaynab_bint_Khuzayma
https://simple.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zaynab_bint_Khuzayma
Source 2: http://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zainab_bint_Chuzaima

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014598142513

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
